section.heading: Definitions

paragraph.heading: Commission.—
paragraph.content: The term “Commission” means the Federal Maritime Commission.

paragraph.heading: Committee.—
paragraph.content: The term “Committee” means the National Shipper Advisory Committee established under section 42502.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 116–283, div. G, title LVXXXVI [LXXXVI], § 8604(a), Jan. 1, 2021, 134 Stat. 4762.)
